ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon (if applicable) */,
  "base_hp" INTEGER /* Base HP stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_attack" INTEGER /* Base Special Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_defense" INTEGER /* Base Special Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_speed" INTEGER /* Base Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_groups" (
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the version group (e.g., Kanto, Johto) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the version group was released */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation of the version group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of the move (e.g., Normal, Flying) */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Base power of the move (if applicable) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy percentage of the move */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Number of times the move can be used */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_move_type FOREIGN KEY ("move_type") REFERENCES move_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon learning the move */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being learned */,
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version group where the move is available */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "learn_method" TEXT /* Method by which the Pokémon learns the move (e.g., level-up, egg, TM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "move_id", "version_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the move type (e.g., Normal, Fire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the ability does */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_abilities" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon with the ability */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability the Pokémon has */,
  "is_hidden_ability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ability is a hidden ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Water, Fire) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move that has this effect */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of what effect the move has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_damage_classes" (
  "damage_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage class */,
  "damage_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the damage class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the damage class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_contest_types" (
  "contest_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest type */,
  "contest_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contest type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_type_id")
)
